closure_definition: Every corpus file is reviewed and every atomic idea has source evidence plus a closed, validated disposition.

coverage.method: verified full-text twin plus direct figure inspection
sequential section pass plus adversarial capability/TODO search
byte/line-equivalence check against Part-1 primary extract
direct visual inspection at high/original resolution
full heading, protocol, checklist and action-item pass
semantic diff against primary variant plus standalone-only review
cross-check against corresponding primary-extract line ranges
